workouts.name: Day 1 - Push Strength
workouts.hypertrophy_focus: Heavy pressing first, then upper-chest, shoulder and triceps volume.
session_tips: Take 2-3 unlogged ramp-up sets before bench; work sets should land around 1-2 reps in reserve.
Use the full rest on presses so load stays high, then keep isolation rests tighter.
When every set reaches the top of its rep range with clean form, add the listed progression next time.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Lower under control, pause lightly, then press hard without bouncing.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 4 sets reach 8 reps with a clean pause.
exercises.notes: Take 2-3 ramp-up sets first. Pause lightly on the chest.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Let the dumbbells travel deep enough to stretch the chest without losing shoulder position.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg per hand after all 3 sets reach 10 reps.
exercises.notes: 30 degree bench. Keep shoulder blades pinned.

exercises.name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Stop each rep just short of elbow lockout if it keeps tension on the delts.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg per hand after all 3 sets reach 10 reps without leaning back.
exercises.notes: Brace hard and press straight up without leaning back.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Use a slight forward lean and lift in the scapular plane to keep tension on the side delts.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 0.5 kg per hand after all 3 sets reach 15 strict reps.
exercises.notes: Lead with elbows and stop the set before momentum takes over.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Lock the upper arms in place and make the last third of the rep deliberate.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 3 sets reach 12 reps without shoulder movement.
exercises.notes: Elbows pinned. Spread the rope hard at lockout.

workouts.name: Day 2 - Pull Strength
workouts.hypertrophy_focus: Vertical pull strength, thick rows and strict elbow flexion.
session_tips: Make the first two back movements heavy and controlled; do not trade range for load.
Keep the chest proud on pulls and finish rows with the back, not the hips.
When all sets hit the top of the range, add the listed progression or reduce assistance on pull-ups.

exercises.name: Pull-ups
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Start each rep from a controlled hang and drive elbows down instead of craning the neck up.
exercises.progression_rule: Add one rep per set before adding load; use less assistance once all 4 sets reach 8.
exercises.notes: Use assistance if needed. Drive elbows down and keep ribs stacked.

exercises.name: Wide-grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Pull to upper chest with a proud torso and let the lats stretch at the top.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 3 sets reach 10 reps without leaning back.
exercises.notes: Chest proud. Pull elbows to the front pockets.

exercises.name: Chest-supported Dumbbell Row
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Keep your chest glued to the bench and pause the dumbbells near the ribs.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg per hand after all 3 sets reach 10 reps with a one-count squeeze.
exercises.notes: Keep the chest on the bench and row toward the hips.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Pull the handle to the lower ribs and hold posture instead of turning it into a hip hinge.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 3 sets reach 12 reps with no torso swing.
exercises.notes: Pause at the torso without leaning back.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Hammer Curl
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Keep wrists neutral and let the elbow fully straighten before the next rep.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 0.5 kg per hand after all 3 sets reach 12 reps without swinging.
exercises.notes: Thumbs up, elbows quiet, full lower.

workouts.name: Day 3 - Posterior Chain + Core
workouts.description: Hinges, glutes, hamstrings, trunk - no squat variations
workouts.hypertrophy_focus: Posterior-chain work that supports upper-body growth without squat patterns.
session_tips: Keep every hinge strict; hamstrings and glutes should limit the set, not the lower back.
Use straps on RDLs if grip limits your hamstring work.
Finish core work controlled and stop if swinging replaces tension.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Reach hips back until hamstrings are loaded, then stand tall without overextending.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 4 sets reach 8 reps with the same depth.
exercises.notes: Hinge from the hips. Soft knees, long hamstrings, neutral spine.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Tuck ribs down and hold the top long enough to feel glutes, not low back.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 5 kg after all 3 sets reach 10 reps with a hard top squeeze.
exercises.notes: Ribs down. Full lockout with a one-count glute squeeze.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Keep hips pressed into the pad and control the final half of the lowering phase.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 3 sets reach 12 reps without hip lift.
exercises.notes: Control the eccentric and keep hips down on the pad.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Use the biggest pain-free stretch you can own and pause both ends of the rep.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 3 sets reach 15 reps with full range.
exercises.notes: Full stretch, hard top contraction, no bouncing.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Posteriorly tilt the pelvis at the top so the abs do the work.
exercises.progression_rule: Add reps until all 3 sets hit 15, then progress to straighter legs.
exercises.notes: Curl pelvis up; do not just swing the legs.

workouts.name: Day 4 - Upper Hypertrophy
workouts.description: Chest and back volume with shoulder balance
workouts.hypertrophy_focus: Upper-chest, lats and shoulder-health volume with moderate loads.
session_tips: Use smooth reps and slightly shorter rests than strength days while keeping load honest.
Pair a press with a row if the gym is busy and you want to keep the session inside 45 minutes.
Keep one rep in reserve on compounds; isolation work can finish closer to failure.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Use a consistent touch point high on the chest and stop before shoulders roll forward.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 4 sets reach 8 reps with the same bar path.
exercises.notes: Upper chest emphasis. Stop one rep before form changes.

exercises.name: Single-arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Let the shoulder blade protract at the bottom, then row to the hip without twisting.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg after all 3 sets reach 10 reps per side.
exercises.notes: Row to the hip and keep the torso square.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Sink into a deep controlled stretch and press without letting dumbbells drift too wide.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg per hand after all 3 sets reach 10 reps.
exercises.notes: Deep stretch, then press in a slight arc together.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.muscle_focus: Rear delts, rotator cuff, lower traps
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Pull toward eye level and rotate thumbs back at the finish.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg after all 3 sets reach 15 reps with clean external rotation.
exercises.notes: High elbows and external rotation for shoulder health.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Let the arms hang behind the torso and avoid bringing elbows forward as reps get hard.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 0.5 kg per hand after all 3 sets reach 12 strict reps.
exercises.notes: Let the biceps lengthen fully. No shoulder swing.

workouts.name: Day 5 - Chest + Back Density
workouts.hypertrophy_focus: Chest and back density with joint-friendly machines and cables.
session_tips: Alternate chest and back exercises when possible to keep output high without extending the session.
Chase stable tension, not sloppy fatigue; cable movements should feel the same rep to rep.
If time is tight, keep the final dip sets honest and skip extra warm-ups.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Use the machine's stability to push close to failure without losing shoulder position.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 3 sets reach 12 reps with full depth.
exercises.notes: Control the negative and keep shoulders packed.

exercises.name: Neutral-grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Keep the grip neutral and pull elbows down until lats are fully shortened.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 3 sets reach 12 reps without torso swing.
exercises.notes: Pull elbows down, not back. Keep the neck relaxed.

exercises.name: Cable Fly
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Keep elbows softly bent and chase a deep pec stretch without turning it into a press.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg per side after all 3 sets reach 15 smooth reps.
exercises.notes: Meet the hands in front of the chest and squeeze.

exercises.name: Straight-arm Pulldown
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Keep arms long and pull the cable toward the thighs by driving from the armpits.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg after all 3 sets reach 15 reps without elbow bend increasing.
exercises.notes: Keep arms long and finish with lats, not triceps.

exercises.name: Cable Rope Rear-Delt Row
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Pull the rope toward upper chest with elbows high and keep traps quiet.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg after all 3 sets reach 12 reps with a top squeeze.
exercises.notes: Elbows high and wide. Own the top squeeze.

exercises.name: Parallel Bar Dip
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Lean slightly forward for chest, stay pain-free, and stop before shoulders dump forward.
exercises.progression_rule: Add reps until both sets hit 12; then consider a small external load.
exercises.notes: Use assistance if needed. Stop before shoulder position gets messy.

workouts.name: Day 6 - Shoulders + Arms
workouts.hypertrophy_focus: Delts and arms with high-quality isolation volume.
session_tips: Keep shoulder pressing clean, then push lateral/rear delt work close to failure.
Do not rush arm eccentrics; the lowering phase is where a lot of the stimulus lives.
Add load only after the target reps are clean without swinging or elbow flare.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Use a smooth rotation and keep the ribcage down so the delts take the load.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg per hand after all 4 sets reach 10 controlled reps.
exercises.notes: Rotate smoothly and keep the reps controlled.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Keep the movement small and strict; rear delts should burn before traps take over.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 0.5 kg per hand after all 3 sets reach 15 strict reps.
exercises.notes: Small arc, high tension, no shrug.

exercises.name: EZ-bar Preacher Curl
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Use the preacher pad to remove momentum and keep tension through the bottom.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 3 sets reach 10 reps without bouncing.
exercises.notes: Strict reps from a full stretch.

exercises.name: EZ-bar Skullcrushers
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Let the bar travel slightly behind the head and keep elbows from flaring wider each rep.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 2.5 kg after all 3 sets reach 10 reps with stable elbows.
exercises.notes: Lower behind the head for the long-head stretch.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: The cable should keep tension at the bottom; stop only when strict reps are gone.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 0.5 kg per side after all 3 sets reach 15 reps without shrugging.
exercises.notes: Lean slightly away and keep tension through the bottom.

exercises.name: Overhead Rope Extension
exercises.hypertrophy_tip: Keep elbows forward and let the rope move behind your head for a full stretch.
exercises.progression_rule: Add 1 kg after both sets reach 15 reps with no elbow flare.
exercises.notes: Elbows forward. Finish without flaring wide.
